name: gmail-n8n-automation
description: Multi-Account Email Auto-Label & Spam Cleanup — N8N + DeepSeek for Gmail & Outlook/Hotmail

scripts.test: npm run test:code && npm run test:utils
scripts.test:code: ts-node src/code/pre-classifier.test.ts && ts-node src/code/classifier.test.ts && ts-node src/code/label-mapper.test.ts && ts-node src/code/payload-builder.test.ts && ts-node src/code/account-config.test.ts && ts-node src/code/spam-deleter.test.ts && ts-node src/code/initial-cleanup.test.ts
scripts.test:utils: ts-node src/utils/env.test.ts && ts-node src/utils/error-handler.test.ts && ts-node src/utils/rate-limiter.test.ts
